name: Customer Order Management
description: The system shall allow users to create, modify, approve, and track customer sales orders throughout their lifecycle. Order statuses should be updated automatically and visible in real time.

name: Purchase Requisition
description: The system shall support the creation of purchase requisitions with configurable approval workflows and automatic conversion into purchase orders.

name: Stock Management
description: The system shall provide real-time inventory visibility, including stock levels, reserved quantities, warehouse locations, and inventory movements.

name: Accounts Payable
description: The system shall manage supplier invoices, payment schedules, approval processes, and automatic posting to the general ledger.

name: Accounts Receivable
description: The system shall support customer invoicing, payment tracking, overdue payment monitoring, and automated reminder notifications.

name: Production Planning
description: The system shall enable production planning based on demand forecasts, sales orders, and available material resources.

name: Preventive Maintenance
description: The system shall schedule preventive maintenance activities based on predefined intervals, equipment usage, or condition-based triggers.

name: Employee Management
description: The system shall maintain employee records, organizational structures, job positions, and employment history in a centralized database.

name: Business Intelligence Dashboard
description: The system shall provide configurable dashboards with key performance indicators, charts, and drill-down capabilities for business analysis.

name: Role-Based Access Control
description: The system shall provide role-based access management, allowing administrators to define permissions for users, groups, and business functions.
